## Description

## Steps to reproduce

2. Subscribe to feed / start sync job '...'
3. See error

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages.

## Logs

Paste relevant container logs here (TIDYDAV_LOG_LEVEL=debug is most helpful).
